message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide methods

class "app_translation\n((Translations))" as app_translation << (I,#4A90E2) >>
class "app_action_button_translation\n((Translations))" as app_action_button_translation << (I,#4A90E2) >>

class "language" as language << (T,#BDBDBD) >>

class "app_action_button\n(App action buttons)" as app_action_button << (T,#F5A3A3) >>
class "app_template\n(App templates)" as app_template << (T,#F5A3A3) >>
class "app\n(Apps)" as app << (T,#F5A3A3) >>

class "integration" as integration << (T,#BDBDBD) >>
class "acl_role" as acl_role << (T,#BDBDBD) >>
class "custom_field_set" as custom_field_set << (T,#BDBDBD) >>
class "webhook" as webhook << (T,#BDBDBD) >>

app_translation : <u>label</u> string
app_translation : description longText
app_translation : privacyPolicyExtensions longText
app_translation : <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
app_translation : updatedAt updatedAt
app_translation : **appId** foreignKey
app_translation : **languageId** foreignKey

app_action_button_translation : <u>label</u> string
app_action_button_translation : <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
app_action_button_translation : updatedAt updatedAt
app_action_button_translation : **appActionButtonId** foreignKey
app_action_button_translation : **languageId** foreignKey

app_action_button : **id** id
app_action_button : <u>entity</u> string
app_action_button : <u>view</u> string
app_action_button : <u>url</u> string
app_action_button : <u>action</u> string
app_action_button : <u>openNewTab</u> bool
app_action_button : label translated
app_action_button : <u>appId</u> foreignKey
app_action_button : <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
app_action_button : updatedAt updatedAt
app_action_button : translated json

app_template : **id** id
app_template : <u>template</u> longText
app_template : <u>path</u> string
app_template : <u>active</u> bool
app_template : <u>appId</u> foreignKey
app_template : <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
app_template : updatedAt updatedAt

app : **id** id
app : <u>name</u> string
app : <u>path</u> string
app : author string
app : copyright string
app : license string
app : <u>active</u> bool
app : <u>configurable</u> bool
app : privacy string
app : <u>version</u> string
app : iconRaw blob
app : icon string
app : appSecret string
app : modules list
app : cookies list
app : label translated
app : description translated
app : privacyPolicyExtensions translated
app : <u>integrationId</u> foreignKey
app : <u>aclRoleId</u> foreignKey
app : <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
app : updatedAt updatedAt
app : translated json

app_translation --> language
app_action_button_translation --> language

app_action_button_translation --> app_action_button
app_action_button --> app
app_template --> app
app_translation --> app

app --> integration
app --> acl_role
app --> custom_field_set
app --> webhook
@enduml
